title: Cathryn Clüver Ashbrook on Office Hours Podcast
summary: Cathryn Clüver Ashbrook (@Cluverc), Executive Director of the Belfer Center’s Future of Diplomacy Project and the newly created Project on Europe and the Transatlantic Relationship, speaks with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about the future of the U.S.-Europe relationship, how language can influence policy, and the benefits of dual citizenship.
authors: Eric Rosenbach, Carlo Giannone, Slavina Ancheva, Luc Hillion, Ethan Lee
body: The latest from Belfer See more Cathryn Clüver Ashbrook (@Cluverc), Executive Director of the Belfer Center’s Future of Diplomacy Project and the newly created Project on Europe and the Transatlantic Relationship, speaks with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about the future of the U.S.-Europe relationship, how language can influence policy, and the benefits of dual citizenship. _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: In the Office Hours Podcast, Cathryn Clüver Ashbrook, Executive Director of the Belfer Center's Future of Diplomacy Project and the Project on Europe and the Transatlantic Relationship, discusses the future of U.S.-Europe relations with Aroop Mukharji. The conversation explores how language and framing can significantly influence policy outcomes and shape diplomatic discourse. Ashbrook also examines the practical and symbolic benefits of dual citizenship in the context of transatlantic ties, highlighting its role in fostering personal and professional connections across borders. The discussion is grounded in the work of her projects, which analyze the evolving diplomatic landscape and the challenges to the traditional transatlantic partnership.
result.main_content_zh: 在Office Hours播客中，贝尔弗中心未来外交项目及新成立的欧洲与跨大西洋关系项目执行主任卡瑟琳·克利弗·阿什布鲁克与阿鲁普·穆哈尔吉讨论了美欧关系的未来。对话深入探讨了语言和叙事框架如何深刻影响政策制定与外交话语。阿什布鲁克还分析了双重国籍在跨大西洋关系背景下的实际与象征性益处，强调了其在促进跨国个人与专业联系中的作用。此次讨论基于她所领导的项目工作，这些项目旨在分析不断演变的外交格局以及传统跨大西洋伙伴关系所面临的挑战。
keywords_en: Project on Europe and the Transatlantic Relationship
